admin.title: User access — Preferans
admin.heading: User access
admin.subtitle: Approve players by email and revoke access immediately when needed.
admin.empty: No player emails have been approved yet.

messages.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
messages.adminManaged: The admin email is managed via environment configuration.
messages.adminProtected: The admin account cannot be removed.
messages.removed: User access removed and active sessions revoked.

errors.unsupportedLocale: Unsupported locale. Allowed values: en, ru, uk.

lobby.title: Lobby — Preferans
lobby.heroSubtitle: Classic card game for three players
lobby.loginPrompt: Sign in to view active games and the player list.
lobby.emptyGames: No open games yet. Create the first one!
lobby.ruleGoalText: Fulfill your contract and take enough tricks.
lobby.ruleDeckText: 32 cards (7 to ace), 3 players, 10 cards each, plus 2 widow cards.
lobby.ruleBiddingText: Players announce contracts in turn. Winner takes widow and selects trump.
lobby.ruleScoringText: Points are based on contract completion. Misere is a no-trick contract.

login.title: Sign in — Preferans
login.heading: 🃏 Sign in
login.subtitle: This is a private game — access is by invitation only.
login.inviteNote: Only approved accounts can sign in.

denied.title: Access Denied — Preferans
denied.heading: 🚫 Access Denied
denied.message: Your Google account is not on the approved list. This game is available by invitation only.

game.title: Game — Preferans
game.playHint: Click the card once more to play it
